primary_surface: Coolify GitHub App source setup page
surfaces: Sources list with GitHub App source card and new source modal
Unconfigured GitHub App source setup page with manual and automated installation
GitHub App manifest registration page using generated one-time state
Authenticated manifest redirect callback status and error states
Post-manifest source page requiring repository installation
GitHub App repository install and re-install screens

Private keys, secrets, application resources, and callback cache

verification.pr_change_visible: Click Register Now and the simulated GitHub form action shows a generated manifest state instead of the source UUID; callback screens show authenticated one-time state consumption and verified install/reinstall behavior.
